title: Learning to Visualize Data
description:
This meetup is targeted to ladies who wants to learn data visualizations and telling story out of data. R is powerful tools for data visualization. So, we will use R to make simpler and easier way to visualize data.

Outline:
- Making visualization effectively
- Using tools for visualization
- Peer to peer learning

Note: Bring your laptops, so we can do cool things in R.

Requirements:
- Install R: http://bit.ly/2L6ydeL
- RStudio: http://bit.ly/2Ztv260
- R packages: http://bit.ly/2ZgWEQB

Come one and bring friends. You'll have interactive learning and networking opportunity.

title: Getting Started with Data Science [Workshop]
description:
R is one of the most popular language to learn Data Science. During the event, you'll find steps to get started in data science. At the event, you'll have opportunities to network and get involved with R community.

Come one and bring all. We're excited about the event.

title: Starting Your Journey in Data
description:
This meetup is targeted for ladies who wants to pursue career in data.
During meetup, you'll have chance to connect with data experts in-person.

Outline:
- What's R and R-Ladies
- My Experience with R
- Making a Career Out of Data
- Things you can do in R
- Reporting/Visualizations
- Networking & Refreshments

Note: Bring your laptops, so we can do cool things in R.

Requirements:
- Install R: http://bit.ly/installR
- RStudio: http://bit.ly/RStudio16

Come one and bring friends. You'll have interactive learning and networking opportunity.

title: Unsupervised learning with K-means clustering
description:
Hi there,

I hope you all are doing well. We are very delightful to inform you all, that we are collaborating with R-ladies Chennai for virtual interaction event, tech talks to learn about "K-means clustering " from Praveena Mathews.

K-means clustering is one of the simplest and best ways to explore about data visually. It is also a very popular unsupervised machine learning algorithm.

Registration instructions : Zoom link will be emailed to those who have registered for the meetup.

R-ladies Chennai
Checkout this Meetup with R-Ladies Chennai: https://meetu.ps/e/Kzf2X/H9bJp/i

Meetup host: Praveena Mathews

title: 4 days workshop
description:
We are holding a four day workshop.We will learn about the R language, its significance, and some of its key packages in these workshops. We will also gain knowledge of data impotation and basic mathematical computation. At last, we'll make a tale from it using various visualization tools.
Participants must bring their laptop, chargers,pens and notebooks.

title: R-Language in mathematic world
description: There is no public call for this. This time, mathematicians are our main focus.

title: Role of R in Data Science (2 days)   venue detail will be mailed .
description: We'll discover what data science is. Data science applications for the R language. We'll also talk about a few common misconceptions around data science.

title: Exploring RLanguage for High School Innovators ( postponed for few days)
description: High school innovators who are keen to discover the potential of data analysis and visualization are the target audience for this one-day session on R programming. The fundamentals of R will be taught to participants, along with how to execute basic mathematical operations like addition and subtraction. Additionally, they will gain practical experience utilizing the well-known ggplot2 toolkit to visualize data and create data frames. Students will be guided through the process of developing their own data sets (such the number of attendees) and transforming them into interesting, educational visualizations during the class.
